Serving Zambia's farming communities

Grow your farm, secure your legacy — all in one place

Connect with buyers, access farm advisory services, protect your family with tailored estate planning, and find local talent.

Digital & mobile-first
Our services

Everything in one ecosystem

Four integrated pillars connecting farmers, families, job seekers, and investors across Zambia.

Agriculture & market access

Post produce, connect with buyers, browse commodity listings, access input suppliers, and request advisory services.

Explore marketplace

Estate planning & family legacy

Secure your family's future with asset documentation, beneficiary registration, and farm succession planning tools.

Start planning

TalentLink recruitment hub

Job board, internship applications, and employer recruitment tools for students, graduates, and employers.

Browse jobs

Enterprise & investment connect

Matchmaking between startups, SMEs, cooperatives, and investors seeking opportunities across Zambia.

Connect now
Membership

Choose your membership

All memberships include a digital certificate and a unique membership number.

Student

Student member

Access TalentLink, internship applications, and training events.

  • Digital membership number
  • Downloadable certificate
  • Member dashboard
Most popular

Farmer member

Full marketplace access, produce listings, input supplier directory, and advisory services.

  • Digital membership number
  • Downloadable certificate
  • Member dashboard
Ordinary

Ordinary member

Estate planning tools, events, and all core community platform features.

  • Digital membership number
  • Downloadable certificate
  • Member dashboard
Associate

Associate member

Affiliate access for partner organisations and development partners.

  • Digital membership number
  • Downloadable certificate
  • Member dashboard
Corporate

Corporate member

Employer recruitment tools, enterprise connect, and investment access for organisations.

  • Digital membership number
  • Downloadable certificate
  • Member dashboard
Honorary

Honorary member

For recognised contributors and partners of Farmers & Trustees Trust.

  • Digital membership number
  • Downloadable certificate
  • Member dashboard

Ready to join the platform?

Register online in minutes. Your digital membership number and certificate are generated instantly on approval. No paperwork, no queues.
